_comment: JSON has no comment syntax, so read this: this file is safe to edit directly in GitHub's web editor, same as config.ini. Delete the example below and add your own. Valid 'status' values: not_started, working_on_it, need_help, ready_for_feedback, fix_and_resubmit, redo, discuss, demonstrate, complete, fail, time_exceeded, do_not_resubmit, feedback_exceeded, assess_in_portfolio. Dates are YYYY-MM-DD. A typo here can never break your real OnTrack data - worst case, that one entry is skipped and a warning shows in the Actions log.
